system.flavor: You freeze the water in the air, creating a fragile icicle - usually a trick for traversing up glacier chasms.
system.effect:
Object create a height 1 icicle object in free space in range. If any character would be pushed or pulled into the object, it shatters, creating a burst 2 effect centered on it. All characters inside take 2 piercing damage, then are pushed 1. Then remove it and replace it with difficult terrain.
Conserve a height 2 object instead.
